/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wextra -Wfatal-errors -ggdb3 -O2 -march=native -mtune=native -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_set_commitment_gadget.dir/gadgetlib1/gadgets/set_commitment/tests/test_set_commitment_gadget.cpp.o -o test_set_commitment_gadget  libsnark.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so -lgmp -lgmpxx -lcrypto ../depends/libzm.a
